svg.title: Store Intelligence full system workflow diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture from CCTV cameras through YOLOv8 detection, tracking, event emission, FastAPI ingestion, SQLite storage, and dashboard rendering.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What RTSP cameras does store intelligence support?')
sendPrompt('Can multiple cameras run simultaneously?')
sendPrompt('What is in store_layout.json and how are zones defined?')
sendPrompt('How does scheduler.py work and what is the 0.2s slice?')
sendPrompt('How does the fetch_cameras thread keep the cache fresh?')
sendPrompt('How does the in-memory camera registry work in cameras.py?')

svg.text: LAYER 3 — DETECT ENDPOINT & CONCURRENCY GUARD (cameras.py detect_camera)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the detect_camera endpoint do and how does claim_camera prevent duplicates?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a duplicate scheduler tick is dropped?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI BackgroundTasks run process_camera in a thread?')
sendPrompt('What does _run_stream do inside detect.py?')
g.text: loads layout · creates emitter · starts processor

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the YOLO model loaded lazily and shared across cameras?')
sendPrompt('How does StaffClassifier detect retail staff uniforms?')
sendPrompt('How does ZoneClassifier map bounding boxes to zone names?')
sendPrompt('How does MultiCameraTracker assign visitor IDs across cameras?')
sendPrompt('How does ClipProcessor open an RTSP stream and loop over frames?')
g.text: cv2.VideoCapture · TCP FFMPEG · skip every 2nd frame

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does YOLOv8 detect people and what is the confidence threshold?')
sendPrompt('How does CameraTracker use IoU and Kalman filters for tracking?')
sendPrompt('How does colour histogram Re-ID work and when does it detect re-entry?')
sendPrompt('What does _process_track decide between entry/exit logic and zone tracking?')
g.text: camera_type == "entry" → tripwire logic · else → zone logic

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the entry tripwire work to detect entries and exits?')
g.text: tripwire at 55% frame height · centroid cross

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does zone tracking detect dwell time and billing queue joins?')
sendPrompt('What fields does every emitted event contain and what is the schema?')
g.text: event_id (uuid4) · store_id · camera_id · visitor_id · event_type · timestamp · zone_id · dwell_ms · confidence · metadata

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When is an ENTRY event emitted?')
sendPrompt('When is an EXIT event emitted?')
sendPrompt('What triggers a ZONE_ENTER event?')
sendPrompt('What triggers a ZONE_EXIT event?')
sendPrompt('How is ZONE_DWELL calculated and when is it emitted?')
sendPrompt('When is BILLING_QUEUE_JOIN emitted?')
sendPrompt('How does the cursor-based JSONL ingest work to avoid re-sending events?')
sendPrompt('How does POST /events/ingest handle deduplication and partial success?')
g.text: idempotent by event_id · batch dedup · 207 on partial reject

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What columns are in the events SQLite table?')
sendPrompt('How does session materialisation work in _update_sessions?')
sendPrompt('How is conversion rate calculated in compute_metrics?')
sendPrompt('How is the conversion funnel computed?')
sendPrompt('How is the zone heatmap score normalised 0-100?')
sendPrompt('What three anomaly types does compute_anomalies detect?')
sendPrompt('What does the Store Intelligence dashboard KPI panel show?')
sendPrompt('How does the funnel chart render in Chart.js?')
sendPrompt('How does the zone heatmap colour scale work in the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does the camera manager register and activate RTSP streams?')
sendPrompt('When does staff_classifier fall back to Claude vision API?')
sendPrompt('What Claude model and prompt is used for staff detection?')

svg.text: Click any box to ask a follow-up question about that component
